hero.title: Turn Your Network Into a Revenue Stream.
hero.subtitle: Join the Edges Network reseller program. Earn competitively up to {monthlyProfit} in profits per month. Start in minutes.

howItWorks.title: Start earning in 4 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Fill in your details, pick your prices, and start making profits today.

steps.title: Fill Your Details
steps.desc: Complete a quick signup form with your business name and preferences. No upfront cost, no technical experience needed.

steps.title: Get Your Storefront Instantly
steps.desc: Your personal branded store goes live immediately after signup, ready to accept customers and process orders right away.

steps.title: Set Your Own Prices
steps.desc: Add your markup to any data bundle or airtime product. You control your margins; your customers pay your price.

steps.title: Earn Directly
steps.desc: Every sale made through your storefront earns you the difference between your markup and the base price, paid straight to you.

items.title: You Set the Prices
items.desc: Add any markup you want to data bundles and airtime. Your store, your margins, your profit — full control, always.

items.title: Store Goes Live Instantly
items.desc: Fill in your details and your branded storefront is ready immediately — no waiting, no approvals, no delays.

items.title: Optional Android App
items.desc: Want your own app? Select the APK option at signup and receive your custom-branded Android app by email within 3–5 business days.

items.title: Live Sales Dashboard
items.desc: Track every order, customer, and earning in real time from your personal reseller portal.

items.title: All Networks Covered
items.desc: Sell all major networks data bundles and airtime — all from a single storefront.

items.title: Backed by Edges Network
items.desc: Your store runs on the same trusted infrastructure powering thousands daily. Reliable delivery, every time.

pricing.title:
Pick the plan that
gives you financial freedom
pricing.subtitle: Start your business today, start earning immediately with a free web store or go bigger with your own Android app.

webStore.name: Web Storefront
webStore.label: Free
webStore.desc: Your own branded web store, live instantly. Sell data bundles and airtime at your own prices with zero setup cost.

mobileApp.name: Web + Android App
mobileApp.label: Most Popular
mobileApp.desc: Everything in the web store, plus your own Android app branded with your name and delivered to your customers.
perks: Download link sent to your email

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.label: Custom
enterprise.desc: For high-volume operators and businesses. Custom integrations, white-label branding, and a dedicated account manager.

items.q: Is there any cost to open my reseller storefront?
items.a: No. Creating your web storefront on Edges Network is completely free. There are no registration fees, monthly charges, or hidden costs to get started.

items.q: How quickly does my store go live?
items.a: Immediately. Fill in your details, submit the form, and your branded storefront is live and ready to accept customers right away, no waiting period.

items.q: Can I set my own prices?
items.a: Yes, that's the point. You add your own markup on top of the base price for any data bundle or airtime product. Whatever your customer pays above the base price is your profit, paid directly to you.

items.q: What is the Android APK option?
items.a: If you want your own mobile app, select the Android APK option during signup. We'll build a custom-branded app for your store and send the download link to your email within {apkDeliveryDays} business days.

items.q: Which networks and products can I sell?
items.a: Your store covers all major networks in your country for data bundles and airtime top-ups. New products are added to the catalog regularly.

items.q: How do I receive my earnings?
items.a: Your profit is the difference between your set price and the base cost. Earnings are tracked in your dashboard and paid out directly to your bank account or mobile money wallet.
